function.name: _wb_create_instance
function.description: Create and start a workflow process instance. ⚠️ Must first call _wb_get_process_define to get the configuration information of the specified workflow process definition, then construct the request parameters according to the returned configuration.

appId.description: The ID of the application where the workflow module is located.

processDefineId.description: Workflow process definition ID. Note this is not the procDefId field returned from instance list.

inputVarMap.description: Input variables for the process instance, key-value pairs format, optional.
